Request a demo
Shaping the future
of e-mobility
in North America.

Our mission? To bring together all charging stakeholders within a comprehensive, smart ecosystem that makes it easy to manage, optimize, and exchange services while simplifying the experience for electric vehicle drivers.

The principles that
guide us

The values that define who we are, how we work, and the decisions we make every day.

Stay Connected

Curiosity drives our innovation. We explore, question, and track trends to deliver solutions that are always efficient and up to date.

Make a Difference
Shared Energy
Keep It Simple
From Quebec startup
to North American leader

Since 2019, AXSO has been shaping the energy transition, with achievements that speak for themselves.

AXSO is founded

2019

A team of 5 passionate developers on a mission to create an innovative solution to simplify EV charging.

Migration to Circuit Électrique

2020

Migration of the solution to Circuit Électrique by Hydro-Québec. AXSO takes over management of the largest public charging network in Canada.

National expansion

2022

Expansion beyond Québec. A partnership with HyperCharge in British Columbia. National expansion.

International expansion

2023

Expansion outside the country. International expansion with Stay-N-Charge.

Eddie launch

2024

Launch of the Eddie solution
